revision.text: {{Sidebar | class = wikitable plainlinks | width = auto | titlestyle = | title = [[Wikipedia:Tools|Editor tools]] | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; | belowstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | headingstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | heading1=[[Wikipedia:Tools/Editing tools|Editing aids]] | content1 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/cgi-bin/altviewer.py? Alt text] *[https://copyvios.toolforge.org/ Copyvio detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Peer_reviewer Peer review] * [[User:Dispenser/Dab solver|Dab solver]] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Dablinks Disambig links] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Rdcheck Redirect check] |heading2=[[Help:Citation tools|Citation tools]] |content2= *'''[https://citer.toolforge.org/ Citer]''' *[http://sumsearch.org/cite/ Biomedical cite] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/citations/ Citation bot] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dupdet/ Dup detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/makeref/ MakeRef] *[https://refill.toolforge.org/ng/ Refill] *[https://archive.org/ WayBack] *[[m:Web2Cit|Web2Cit]] | heading3= [[Wikipedia:Maintenance#Things to watch out for|Things to review]] | content3 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/copypatrol/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed |New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]] *[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?userExpLevel=unregistered&hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&limit=500&days=30&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] |below= [[Wikipedia:Customisation|Customisation]] |name=Editor tools }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{Sidebar | class = wikitable plainlinks | width = auto | titlestyle = | title = [[Wikipedia:Tools|Editor tools]] | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; | belowstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | headingstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | heading1=[[Wikipedia:Tools/Editing tools|Editing aids]] | content1 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/cgi-bin/altviewer.py? Alt text] *[https://copyvios.toolforge.org/ Copyvio detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Peer_reviewer Peer review] * [[User:Dispenser/Dab solver|Dab solver]] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Dablinks Disambig links] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Rdcheck Redirect check] |heading2=[[Help:Citation tools|Citation tools]] |content2= *'''[https://citer.toolforge.org/ Citer]''' *[http://sumsearch.org/cite/ Biomedical cite] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/citations/ Citation bot] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dupdet/ Dup detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/makeref/ MakeRef] *[https://refill.toolforge.org/ng/ Refill] *[https://archive.org/ WayBack] *[[m:Web2Cit|Web2Cit]] | heading3= [[Wikipedia:Maintenance#Things to watch out for|Things to review]] | content3 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/copypatrol/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed |New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]] *[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?userExpLevel=unregistered&hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&limit=500&days=30&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] |below= [[Wikipedia:Customisation|Customisation]] |name=Editor tools }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

{{Sidebar | class = wikitable plainlinks | width = auto | titlestyle = | title = [[Wikipedia:Tools|Editor tools]] | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; | belowstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | headingstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | heading1=[[Wikipedia:Tools/Editing tools|Editing aids]] | content1 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/cgi-bin/altviewer.py? Alt text] *[https://copyvios.toolforge.org/ Copyvio detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Peer_reviewer Peer review] * [[User:Dispenser/Dab solver|Dab solver]] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Dablinks Disambig links] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Rdcheck Redirect check] |heading2=[[Help:Citation tools|Citation tools]] |content2= *'''[https://citer.toolforge.org/ Citer]''' *[http://sumsearch.org/cite/ Biomedical cite] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/citations/ Citation bot] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dupdet/ Dup detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/makeref/ MakeRef] *[https://refill.toolforge.org/ng/ Refill] *[https://archive.org/ WayBack] *[[m:Web2Cit|Web2Cit]] | heading3= [[Wikipedia:Maintenance#Things to watch out for|Things to review]] | content3 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/copypatrol/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed |New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]] *[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?userExpLevel=unregistered&hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&limit=500&days=30&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] |below= [[Wikipedia:Customisation|Customisation]] |name=Editor tools }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Sidebar | class = wikitable plainlinks | width = auto | titlestyle = | title = [[Wikipedia:Tools|Editor tools]] | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; | belowstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | headingstyle = background:#E9E9E9;padding:0.1em 0; | heading1=[[Wikipedia:Tools/Editing tools|Editing aids]] | content1 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/cgi-bin/altviewer.py? Alt text] *[https://copyvios.toolforge.org/ Copyvio detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Peer_reviewer Peer review] * [[User:Dispenser/Dab solver|Dab solver]] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Dablinks Disambig links] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Rdcheck Redirect check] |heading2=[[Help:Citation tools|Citation tools]] |content2= *'''[https://citer.toolforge.org/ Citer]''' *[http://sumsearch.org/cite/ Biomedical cite] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/citations/ Citation bot] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dupdet/ Dup detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/makeref/ MakeRef] *[https://refill.toolforge.org/ng/ Refill] *[https://archive.org/ WayBack] *[[m:Web2Cit|Web2Cit]] | heading3= [[Wikipedia:Maintenance#Things to watch out for|Things to review]] | content3 = *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/copypatrol/en Copyvios] *[[Special:NewPagesFeed |New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]] *[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?userExpLevel=unregistered&hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&limit=500&days=30&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 IP edits] *[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]] |below= [[Wikipedia:Customisation|Customisation]] |name=Editor tools }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Editor_tools here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Editor_tools for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Sidebar | class = wikitable plainlinks | width = auto | titlestyle = background:#dadde3;padding:0.2em; | title = [[Wikipedia:Tools|Editor tools]] | contentclass = plainlist | contentstyle = padding-top:0.2em;line-height:1.6em; | belowstyle = background: #eaecf0;padding:0.1em 0; | headingstyle = background: #eaecf0;padding:0.1em 0; | heading1=[[Wikipedia:Tools/Editing tools|Editing aids]] | content1 = *'''[https://copyvios.toolforge.org/ Copyvio detector]''' *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/cgi-bin/altviewer.py? Alt text] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Peer_reviewer Peer review] * [[User:Dispenser/Dab solver|Dab solver]] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Dablinks Disambig links] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dispenser/view/Rdcheck Redirect check] |heading2=[[Help:Citation tools|Citation tools]] |content2= *'''[https://citer.toolforge.org/ Citer]''' *'''[https://tools.wmflabs.org/citations/ Citation bot]''' *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/dupdet/ Dup detector] *[https://tools.wmflabs.org/makeref/ MakeRef] *'''[https://refill.toolforge.org/ng/ Refill]''' *[https://archive.org/ WayBack] *[[m:Web2Cit|Web2Cit]] | heading3= [[Wikipedia:Maintenance#Things to watch out for|Things to review]] | content3 = *'''[https://tools.wmflabs.org/copypatrol/en Copyvios]''' *[[Special:NewPagesFeed |New pages]] *[[Special:NewFiles|New files]] *[[Special:RecentChanges|Recent changes]] *[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?userExpLevel=unregistered&hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&limit=500&days=30&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 IP edits] *'''[[Wikipedia:Dashboard|Discussions]]''' |below= [[Wikipedia:Customisation|Customisation]] |name=Editor tools }}<noinclude><!-- Place categories at the /doc subpage; not here please. --> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]

See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Editor_tools for full history.
